footer.tagline: On-demand wash & detail in LA. Vetted pros. Pay only after you approve the work. Auto, home, big rig — get it sheened.
footer.address: sheen.co · Los Angeles · made for what shines

landing.subhead: Book a vetted local pro in 60 seconds. Your car, your home, your storefront — professionally cleaned, payment held until you approve, no awkward driveway negotiations.

category.bigRigDesc: Tractors, trailers, sleepers — at the rest stop or yard.
category.homeDesc: Driveways, siding, decks, solar — soft-wash where it matters.

landing.membershipBody: Auto, Big Rig, or both. Plans include guaranteed washes, priority scheduling, and 100% loyalty-point earn rate.
landing.membershipBasicDesc: 4 Express OR 2 Full Detail per month. 2× points.
landing.membershipProDesc: 4 Full Detail + 1 Premium per month. 3× points.
landing.stepsHeadline:
BOOK IN SIXTY
SECONDS. DONE
BEFORE LUNCH.
landing.step1Desc: Express, full detail, premium, showroom. Or home power-wash. Or your fleet.
landing.step2Desc: Confirm address. Same-day, tomorrow, this week — pick the window. Rush in 60 minutes if you need it now.
landing.step3Desc: Vetted, insured, background-checked. Live arrival tracking. Real photo, not just a name.
landing.step4Desc: We hold the payment. The pro sends 4 finished-work photos. You approve, then they get paid. No surprises.
landing.trustPhotosLabel: Of the finished work, every time
landing.recruitBody: Sheen is the platform; the customers are yours. Get a personal @handle, share it, and direct bookings come to you first — locked to you for 10 minutes, no queue race. Payments, insurance, and disputes — we handle. Keep up to 88% + 100% of tips. Cash out same-day.

auto.subhead: Pick a tier, drop a pin, your pro shows up. Self-contained rig, two-bucket method, ceramic-safe products.
auto.why1Desc: Wash bucket + rinse bucket on every car. Microfiber per panel — never the same towel on the wheels and the paint.
auto.why2Desc: Your money sits in escrow until you tap Approve. Your pro sends 4 finished-work photos and you compare against your booking-time photos. If something's off, file an objection with a photo or video right from the app.
auto.why3Desc: Self-contained water + power. No hose hookup, no power cord through your window. Zero footprint on your driveway.
auto.why4Desc: $2,500 guarantee on every wash + $1M general liability on the platform. File from the app within 24 hours. Paid out from a platform reserve, not the pro's pocket.
auto.faq1Q: Do you bring water and power?
auto.faq1A: Yes. Every Sheen pro carries a self-contained rig — water tank, power, eco-friendly soaps. No hose hookup needed. If your driveway has water/power, the pro uses it; if not, they bring it.
auto.faq2A: We hold your card on file but only charge when you Approve the wash. Your pro sends 4 finished-work photos so you can review before paying. If something's wrong, you can file an objection with a photo or video and the funds stay on hold while we review.
auto.faq3A: Reschedule free up to one hour before. We monitor radar and reach out first if it looks bad.
auto.faq4A: Ceramic-safe wax, pH-balanced shampoo, microfiber per panel. We won't touch your paint with anything we wouldn't use on our own.
auto.faq5Q: Can I request a specific pro?
auto.faq5A: Yes. Every washer has a personal @handle. Type it at booking and the wash is sent ONLY to them for 10 minutes — locked, no other pro can take it. If they pass, it falls to the open queue so you're still covered.
auto.faq6Q: How does the damage guarantee work?
auto.faq6A: Every wash is covered up to $2,500. File from the app within 24 hours of completion.
auto.faq7Q: Do tips go to the pro?
auto.faq7A: 100%, no platform cut. Default prompts at 18 / 22 / 25%, custom amounts allowed.

wash.subhead: Run your own book of business on Sheen's platform. Direct customers are locked to you for 10 minutes — no queue race. Keep 78% day one, up to 88% as you climb. 100% of tips, instant. Cash out same-day.
wash.kit1Desc: Min 1.6 GPM. Foam cannon a plus.
wash.kit2Desc: Wash + rinse buckets, microfiber towels, drying towels.
wash.kit3Desc: BYO tank/generator if the site doesn't have it. Customers tell us up front.
wash.kit4Desc: Clay bar, wax, leather conditioner, tire shine, glass cleaner.
wash.kit5Desc: Long hose, ladder, telescoping brushes — unlocks 2–6× pay.
wash.kit6Desc: $1M GL. Upload PDF or photo at /pro/verify.
wash.ladderBody: Quality is the engine. Hit the milestones, keep more of every wash. Rookie and Verified are live today — Pro/Elite/Legend roll out as the network scales.
wash.promote1Title: Run your own book of business
wash.promote1Desc: Sheen is the platform; the customers are yours. Every pro gets a personal @handle and shareable link. Customers book you by name — Sheen handles the payments, insurance, and disputes; you keep the relationship.
wash.promote2Desc: When a customer books with your @handle, that wash is sent ONLY to you for 10 minutes — no queue race, no other pro can see or claim it. Accept on your terms. If you pass, it falls to the open queue so the customer's still covered.
wash.promote3Desc: Once a customer is yours, the platform commission drops to 18% on every repeat job they book with you. Build a regular route and the math works in your favour.
wash.promote4Desc: 100% of tips route directly to your Stripe balance — no skim, no hold. Cash out same-day or instant.
wash.step1Desc: 2-minute form. Tell us your equipment + service area.
wash.step2Desc: Set up payouts, upload insurance, submit for background check. 24–48h.
wash.step3Desc: Jobs hit your queue. Accept, navigate, wash, get paid.
wash.faq1A: Job pay lands in your Stripe balance the moment the customer approves the wash (or 24h auto-approve). Cash out instantly to your debit card any time you have a balance — Sheen draws on Stripe's instant_available balance, so a freshly funded wash is withdrawable in minutes, not 1–2 business days.
wash.faq2A: 22% on a customer's first job with you. 18% on every repeat. Tips are 100% yours, period. As you climb the tier ladder, your platform take drops further — Legend pros keep 88%.
wash.faq3A: Pick a handle (@YOURNAME) once. Share your link, hand out a card, drop it in your bio. When a customer books with it, the booking is sent ONLY to you for 10 minutes — locked, no queue race. If you accept it's yours; if you pass it falls to the open queue so the customer is still covered.
wash.faq4A: Reliable transport that can carry your gear. Plenty of our pros use a sedan + foldable kit.
wash.faq5Q: What if the site has no water or power?
wash.faq5A: Customers answer those questions up front when booking — water, power, gate code, the works. If you don't BYO water/power, those specific jobs just don't show in your queue. No surprises on arrival.
wash.faq6Q: What if a customer is a no-show?
wash.faq6A: Flag the job from the navigation page. The customer is auto-charged a no-show fee. You get paid for showing up.
wash.faq7A: Sheen carries $1M general liability on every wash and a $2,500 damage guarantee that covers small mishaps without you reaching for your own policy. We mediate every claim.
wash.joinSubhead: $1M GL required. Background check via Checkr. Onboarding in ~2 minutes.

home.subhead: Soft-wash certified pros for siding. Pressure-washed concrete. Deck-safe pH. Solar-panel cleanings that move output. Transparent pricing, no deposit — and you only pay once you approve the finished work.
home.why1Desc: Siding gets a low-pressure soft-wash with biodegradable cleaner — never blasted. No paint damage, no water intrusion.
home.why2Desc: We pH-balance for wood, composite, and stone. Your deck doesn't get bleached out.
home.why3Desc: Cleaners break down within 24 hours. Storm-drain compliant in every LA county.
home.why4Desc: Dust + bird droppings cost real watts. Our deionized rinse leaves zero residue.
home.tier1Desc: Up to 800 sq ft of concrete or pavers. Oil-spot pre-treat, concrete-safe rinse.
home.tier2Desc: Siding + drive + walks. Soft-wash on siding, pressure on hardscape — biodegradable cleaners.
home.tier3Desc: Wood-safe pH soft-wash. Furniture moved & replaced. Pairs with any tier above.
home.tier4Desc: Deionised water rinse, soft-touch finish. No chemicals near the panels — recovers real watts.
home.ctaSubhead: Same-week windows in LA. Eco-friendly. $1M GL on every pro.

bigRig.headline:
BIG RIGS.
FOAM. POLISH.
GO.
bigRig.subhead: Mobile big-rig wash, polish, and paint correction. At the rest stop, the yard, or the customer's lot. Equipment-verified pros only. Pay only after you approve the finished work.
bigRig.why1Desc: Rest stop, yard, drop lot, your driveway — wherever you've parked. No detour, no detailing-shop appointment.
bigRig.why2Desc: Pros confirmed for big-rig before booking: long hoses, foam cannon, ladders, high-flow pumps. No half-built rigs trying to do a 53-footer.
bigRig.why3Desc: $1M GL on every pro. $2,500 damage guarantee on every wash. File from the app within 24 hours.
bigRig.why4Desc: Quick rinse before a CSA-anything inspection. Or full showroom-grade for a tradeshow / sale.
bigRig.membershipsBody: Built for owner-operators and small fleets. Guaranteed washes every month, priority routing, 100% loyalty-point earn rate.
bigRig.m1Desc: 1 Trailer Wash per month — built for owner-operators.
bigRig.m2Desc: 2 big-rig washes up to Full Rig Detail. For grinders.
bigRig.m3Desc: 1 auto Premium Detail + 1 Trailer Wash. For two-vehicle pros.
m3Fits: Up to Premium auto / Trailer rig
bigRig.faq1Q: Can you wash at a truck stop?
bigRig.faq1A: Yes. Drop the pin, your pro confirms space + access, and they show up with their own water and power.
bigRig.faq2A: Exterior wash works either way. For Full Rig Detail interiors we do the cab while the box stays sealed.
bigRig.faq3A: All of them. Pros mark the rig types they handle when they opt in to the big-rig queue. We only route what they're set up for.
bigRig.faq4Q: How long does Showroom Rig take?
bigRig.faq4A: Plan a full 8 hours. Paint correction on a 70-foot rig isn't a quick job. We don't cheat the time.
bigRig.closingSubhead: Same-day windows in LA. Insured pros. 100% of tips to your driver.

business.headline:
STOREFRONTS.
FLEETS.
POST-CONSTRUCTION.
business.subhead: Site visit, custom quote in 24h, net-30 invoicing for verified businesses. $1M GL on every wash, dedicated account routing.
business.vertical1D: Sidewalks, entries, awnings, glass. Pre-open windows so your AM customers walk into clean.
business.vertical2D: Garages, breezeways, pool decks, common-area glass. Recurring schedules with discounted rates.
business.vertical3D: From 5-vehicle fleets to dealer lots. Big-rig capable pros for long-haul trucks.
business.vertical4D: Concrete dust, paint over-spray, glass cleanup. Final-walk-ready turnover for GCs.
business.quoteBody: One of our partners will reach out in 24 hours with a custom quote. No obligation, no deposit.
business.formNotes: Scope (sidewalk + entry, windows, awning, lot, fleet count + types, etc.)

safety.headline:
THE WHOLE
TRANSACTION
IS ON RAILS.
safety.subhead: Vetted pros, payment held until you approve, photos every time, $2,500 damage cover, $1M GL.
safety.closingBody: We answer in plain English, fast. Trust pages shouldn't need a decoder ring.

items.damageDesc: Every wash is covered. File from the app within 24 hours of completion. Paid out from a platform-funded reserve — no fight with the pro's insurance.
items.glDesc: Required from every pro at onboarding. Document verified by ops, re-checked at expiry, auto-suspended if it lapses.
items.bgDesc: Checkr-verified at onboarding. Two-strike auto-suspension at ≤2★ ratings within a 30-day window.
items.qrDesc: When the pro arrives they show a QR code — you scan with your phone camera or read off the 8-character code. Timer doesn't start until you confirm.
items.approveDesc: Your card is charged at booking, but funds sit in escrow until the pro finishes AND you approve the work. One tap to release. We hold the line for you.
items.fourPhotosDesc: Front, back, driver side, passenger side. Your pro can't mark a job complete without uploading all four. You compare them with the photos you took at booking before approving.
items.objectTitle: Object with a photo or video
items.objectDesc: If something's off, file an objection right from the approval card. Attach photos or a short video; funds stay on hold while we review. Resolved in 48 hours, paid out from a platform reserve.
items.trackDesc: See your pro's photo, name, vehicle, and live location on the way. We let you know the moment they pull up to your address.
items.tipsDesc: Pros don't see what you tipped until after you've rated them. No retaliation, no awkwardness. 100% goes to the pro.
items.anonDesc: Public reviews byline the vehicle washed (e.g. "2014 Dodge Dart"), not the customer's name. Honest feedback without sharing your identity.
items.fairDesc: Late cancels, no-shows, and on-site issues are charged the same way to customers and pros. Disputes are reviewed within 48 hours.

items.bookingDesc: Free reschedule up to 1 hour before your window. Cancel anytime — refunded to your original payment if your pro hasn't started yet. ASAP / Rush bookings get a guaranteed pro within 60 minutes.
items.paymentDesc: Your card is held at booking but only charged after you Approve the wash. Your pro uploads 4 finished-work photos at completion; tap Approve to release the funds, or file an objection with photo/video evidence if something's off.
items.damageDesc: Open the wash in the Washes tab and tap "Something's wrong" within 24 hours of completion. Attach photos or a video. Up to $2,500 covered automatically — paid from a platform reserve, not the pro's pocket.
items.directDesc: Type a pro's @handle (or use their share link) at booking. The wash is sent ONLY to them for 10 minutes — no other pro can take it. If they pass it falls to the open queue so you're still covered.
items.tipDesc: Default 18 / 22 / 25%, custom amounts allowed. 100% goes to your pro, no platform cut. Tip after you rate — pros don't see the amount until they've been reviewed.
items.receiptDesc: Emailed at job completion. View any time from the Washes tab — every line shows service + trust fee + tip + total.
items.memberDesc: Monthly plan that bundles Express or Full Detail washes at a lower per-wash price plus 2× loyalty points. Cancel any time, no contracts.

auth.sublineCustomer: Save your garage, your places, and your wallet. Book in 60 seconds, every time.
auth.sublineWasher: 2 minutes to apply. We verify ID + insurance before activation. Approved in 24-48h.
auth.sublinePartner: Add your shop, your team, your inventory. We send vetted jobs your way.
auth.termsPrefix: By creating an account you agree to our
auth.signInSubline: Sign in to your Sheen account.

notifications.completeTitle: Your Sheen is done — tap to approve
notifications.completeBody: Review the photos and approve to pay your pro.
notifications.checkinBody: Timer's running. You'll be paid once the customer approves.
notifications.directRequestBody: Tap to view — exclusive to you for 10 minutes.
